description: CompositionWhite kurta made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline, pin-tucks around the neckline, cut out design extending from the front to the back, three quarter sleeves with pintuck design on the cuffs and has a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThere's a bright, gypsy style fabric pattern trending in fashion circuits at the moment which is already selling like hot cakes on myntra - so you'll stay in trend when you wear this biba kurta. This piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size 38 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
